where.if: AND ( patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR patient_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR accession_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (patient_id, patient_name, accession_number, gender, age, study_date, image_path, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{entity.patientId}, #{entity.patientName}, #{entity.accessionNumber}, #{entity.gender}, #{entity.age}, #{entity.studyDate}, #{entity.imagePath}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.createdAt}, #{entity.updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ${tableName} SET patient_id = #{entity.patientId}, patient_name = #{entity.patientName}, accession_number = #{entity.accessionNumber}, gender = #{entity.gender}, age = #{entity.age}, study_date = #{entity.studyDate}, image_path = #{entity.imagePath}, remark = #{entity.remark}, updated_at = #{entity.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{entity.id}
